name: Strawberry Yoghurt Muffins
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F, prepare pans.
1. Cream together the margarine (or butter) and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, then stir in the strawberry yoghurt and milk.
3. Gently fold in the chopped strawberries, lemon juice, and rind.
4. Carefully incorporate the self-raising flour until just combined; avoid overmixing to ensure the fruit remains intact.
5. Spoon batter into muffin cases.
6. Bake for about 20 minutes, or longer if using frozen fruit. The muffins are done when a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Variations: Any fresh berry fruit may be substituted for the strawberries (raspberries, blackberries, blackcurrants, elderberries, or blueberries). If using tart fruits such as blackberries, omit the lemon.
